verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a member of the IZUMO family of immunoglobulin-like proteins. While IZUMO1 is the best-characterized family member (sperm surface protein essential for gamete fusion), IZUMO4 is expressed predominantly in testis/sperm. IZUMO family members are GPI-anchored or single-pass TM outer-leaflet proteins on sperm cells. IZUMO4 has documented sperm/testis-restricted surface expression, placing it in the tissue_restricted_surface category — it reaches the outer leaflet via its own anchor but only in this narrow germline/reproductive lineage. This warrants contextual rather than yes.
